articles.author: Sarah Kaplan
articles.title: Artemis II splashes down safely after historic voyage around the moon - The Washington Post
articles.description: NASA’s Orion module splashed into the Pacific Ocean just after 8 p.m. Eastern on Friday, concluding an important test for the Artemis program.
articles.content: NASAs Orion module splashed into the Pacific Ocean just after 8 p.m. Eastern on Friday, safely delivering the four astronauts of the Artemis II mission from their record-setting journey around the mo… [+2 chars]

articles.author: Lydia Amazouz
articles.title: NASA Signals Major Artemis 3 Leap As Moon Return Strategy Accelerates - The Daily Galaxy
articles.description: NASA is already preparing Artemis 3 while Artemis 2 returns home, signaling an accelerated path back to the Moon.
articles.content: NASA is already shifting focus toward Artemis 3 even as Artemis 2 continues its mission, a move highlighted by NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman that underscores a decisive push toward a sustained hu… [+5579 chars]
